# Matter Tracker

A practice-management tool built for small and mid-size law firms. Matter
Tracker helps attorneys and paralegals track every open matter and docket
deadline in one place, manage IOLTA trust accounting so client funds stay
compliant, and generate engagement letters for new clients automatically.
Before a new matter is opened, the built-in conflict-check workflow scans
existing clients and adverse parties to flag potential conflicts of interest.

The app integrates with Clio and PACER, so filings can be pulled directly
into a matter via CM/ECF without manual re-entry. Retainer tracking and
billing are matter-scoped, keeping trust and operating funds separated per
state bar trust-accounting rules.

## Installation

npm install
npm run dev
